# volcenginecc_dns_backup (Resource)

Backup Information

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "volcenginecc_dns_backup" "DNSBackupDemo" {
  zid = "21xxxx"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `zid` (String) The domain ID for which you need to manually create a backup. You can call the ListZones API to obtain the domain ID.

### Read-Only

- `backup_id` (String) Backup ID.
- `backup_time` (String) Backup creation time. Time zone is UTC+8.
- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.
- `record_count` (Number) Number of DNS records in the backup.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import volcenginecc_dns_backup.example "zid|backup_id"
```
